ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisers" (
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adviser */,
  "adviser_name" TEXT /* Full name of the adviser */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the adviser belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code used in the university system */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that offers the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the grade was earned */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course was taken */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., letter, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpa" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "prev_term_gpa" REAL /* GPA from the previous term */,
  "term_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "struggle" (
  "struggle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each struggle record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Level of struggle (1-5, with 5 being the highest) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the student's struggle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("struggle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggle_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggle_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_structures" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in programming language structures */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programming_structures_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course relation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "related_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related course */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., prerequisite, subsequent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_relations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_relations_related_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course was taken */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., student performance, course effectiveness) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student (if applicable) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (if applicable) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in a JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
